steps.title: Use the dash definition
steps.content: The phrase after the dash defines the blank: "variations in size, shape, and material." The missing word must therefore mean lack of uniformity among the microplastic particles.

steps.title: Reject mismatched nouns
steps.content: A means limitations or controls, not variation. C means things cannot work together, which is stronger than the idea of particles differing in size, shape, and material. D means interruptions or disturbances. The remaining word matches variation among particles. The answer is B.
